Starting hardware synthesis ...
Synthesizing 'mmult_hw' ...
Renaming port name 'mmult_hw/out' to 'mmult_hw/out_r' to avoid the conflict with HDL keywords or other object names.
-- Implementing module 'mmult_hw'
Starting scheduling ...
Pipelining loop 'L1_L2'.
Pipelining result : Target II = 1, Final II = 1, Depth = 567.
Estimated clock period (9.634ns) exceeds the target (target clock period: 10ns, clock uncertainty: 1.25ns, effective delay budget: 8.75ns).

The critical path in module 'mmult_hw' consists of the following: 'mul' operation of DSP[587] ('tmp', mmult_accel.cpp:22) [581] (3.36 ns) 'add' operation of DSP[587] ('tmp_1', mmult_accel.cpp:22) [587] (3.02 ns) 'getelementptr' operation ('out_addr', mmult_accel.cpp:22) [589] (0 ns) 'store' operation (mmult_accel.cpp:22) of variable 'sum_1_138', mmult_accel.cpp:20 on array 'out_r' [2270] (3.25 ns)
